name: Sky Cavalry Centaurea
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>セイントレア
desc:
2 Level 2 monsters
Cannot be destroyed by battle while it has material. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can detach 1 material from this card; return that opponent's monster to the hand.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Applies effects if Xyz Material is attached
